about-description: My name is Corentin and I'm 21 years old. I am now a 4th-year student at Epitech, in exchange at Keimyung University (South Korea), specializing in Video Game Development. I am looking for a 6 months part-time internship in this field, from September to February 2023.
about-profile-description: Naturally curious, I always like to discover new things, driving me to always improve. My rigorous and methodical work ensures me to achieve all my projects and goals. My ambitions led me in the past to be a professor at my own university and even move halfway around the world. Rich experiences full of personal achievements.
